MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Laramar Urban Specialty, is present. Represented by Josh Pebet.
Attorney, Jak Marquez, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Jessie Houston and Stephanie Granton, are present.
Attorney, John Weinstein , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.
